context: Tests whether the agent correctly adds a Zsh shell plugin as a chezmoi external, using the proper directory structure, SHA-pinned git-repo type, Renovate annotation, and structured output format.

checklist.name: Correct file placement
checklist.description: Proposes adding to home/.chezmoiexternals/zsh.externals.toml (or .toml.tmpl), NOT to home/.chezmoiexternal.toml or any other location

checklist.name: git-repo type
checklist.description: External definition uses `type = "git-repo"` (not file, archive, or archive-file)

checklist.name: SHA-pinned revision
checklist.description: The `revision` field contains a 40-character hexadecimal commit SHA, not a branch name like 'master' or 'main'

checklist.name: Renovate annotation present
checklist.description: Includes a `# renovate: repo=zsh-users/zsh-autosuggestions branch=...` comment immediately before the external entry

checklist.name: git-refs datasource
checklist.description: Renovate rule uses `datasourceTemplate: 'git-refs'` (not github-releases or github-tags)

checklist.name: Correct fileMatch
checklist.description: Renovate rule fileMatch targets the .chezmoiexternals/ directory pattern (contains `.chezmoiexternals`)

checklist.name: chezmoi diff step
checklist.description: Proposal includes `chezmoi diff` as a verification step before apply

checklist.name: No apply command issued
checklist.description: Does NOT include `chezmoi apply` as a command to run immediately — only lists it as an optional next step

checklist.name: Structured output sections
checklist.description: proposal.md contains distinct sections covering: target file, TOML content, Renovate rule, and verification commands
